<span class='huge'>Conference papers</span><br>

<span class='bigger'>2020</span><br>


<div id="div2">
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>RP-DNN: a tweet-level propagation context based deep neural networks for early rumour detection in social media</span><br>
  Jie Gao, <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Xingy Song, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  Registered as a presenter at <a href="https://lrec2020.lrec-conf.org/en/" target="_blank">Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC)</a><br>
  <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2002.12683.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a> &nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/soojihan/RPDNN" target="_blank"><img src="images/github.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>

<span class='bigger'>2019</span><br>
<div id="div2">

  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>Neural language model based training data augmentation for weakly supervised early rumour detection</span><br>
  <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  <span class="paperhl">Acceptance rate: 14%</span><br>
  Presented at <a href="http://asonam.cpsc.ucalgary.ca/2019/" target="_blank">Advances in Social Networks Analysis and Mining (ASONAM)</a><br>
  <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/1907.07033.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>  &nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/soojihan/Multitask4Veracity" target="_blank"><img src="images/github.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>
<div id="div2">

  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>Data augmentation for rumour detection using context-sensitive neural language model with large-scale credibility corpus  </span><br>
  <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  <span class="paperhl">Spotlight</span><br>
  Presented at <a href="https://iclr.cc/Conferences/2019" target="_blank">International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)</a> workshop on <a href="https://lld-workshop.github.io/" target="_blank">Learning from Limited Labeled Data (LLD)</a><br>
  <a href="https://openreview.net/pdf?id=SyxCysRNdV" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a> &nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/soojihan/Multitask4Veracity" target="_blank"><img src="images/github.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>
<div id="div3">

  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>Rumour detection on social media for crisis management</span><br>
  <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span> and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  Presented at <a href="https://iscram2019.webs.upv.es/" target="_blank">Information Systems for Crisis Response and Management (ISCRAM)</a><br>
  <a href="https://pdfs.semanticscholar.org/8298/9a83f48551fc87734e2a2cdac69dbd312d24.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>


<br>
<span class='huge'>Ph.D. thesis</span><br>

<div id="div2">

  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>Context-aware message-level rumour detection with weak supervision</span><br>
  The University of Sheffield<br>
  <a href="http://etheses.whiterose.ac.uk/27302/1/shan_finalcopy.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>



<!-- <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
<div id="div2">
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; RP-DNN: a tweet-level propagation context based deep neural networks for early rumour detection in social media</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Jie Gao, <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Xingy Song, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Registered as a presenter at <a href="https://lrec2020.lrec-conf.org/en/" target="_blank">Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC)</a><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/2002.12683.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a> &nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/soojihan/RPDNN" target="_blank"><img src="images/github.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>

<span class='bigger'>2019</span><br>
<div id="div2">
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Neural language model based training data augmentation for weakly supervised early rumour detection</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="paperhl">Acceptance rate: 14%</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Presented at <a href="http://asonam.cpsc.ucalgary.ca/2019/" target="_blank">Advances in Social Networks Analysis and Mining (ASONAM)</a><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://arxiv.org/pdf/1907.07033.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>  &nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/soojihan/Multitask4Veracity" target="_blank"><img src="images/github.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>
<div id="div2">
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Data augmentation for rumour detection using context-sensitive neural language model with large-scale credibility corpus  </span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span>, Jie Gao, and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="paperhl">Spotlight</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Presented at <a href="https://iclr.cc/Conferences/2019" target="_blank">International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)</a> workshop on <a href="https://lld-workshop.github.io/" target="_blank">Learning from Limited Labeled Data (LLD)</a><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://openreview.net/pdf?id=SyxCysRNdV" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a> &nbsp; <a href="https://github.com/soojihan/Multitask4Veracity" target="_blank"><img src="images/github.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>
<br>
<div id="div2">
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Rumour detection on social media for crisis management</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <span class="fancy-underline">Sooji Han</span> and Fabio Ciravegna<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Presented at <a href="https://iscram2019.webs.upv.es/" target="_blank">Information Systems for Crisis Response and Management (ISCRAM)</a><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="https://pdfs.semanticscholar.org/8298/9a83f48551fc87734e2a2cdac69dbd312d24.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>


<br>
<span class='huge'>Ph.D. thesis</span><br>

<div id="div2">
 <img src="images/paper.png" id='img3'>
  <span class='boldfont' padding: 10px 20px>&nbsp; Context-aware message-level rumour detection with weak supervision</span><br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; The University of Sheffield<br>
  &emsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="http://etheses.whiterose.ac.uk/27302/1/shan_finalcopy.pdf" target="_blank"><img src="images/pdf.png" id='img3'></a>
</div>-->
